calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Sidney A. Luscutoff, Esq., appearing for T.P. Seafood & Meat Company, Inc.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Hangen, LLC.
Witnesses Henry Yip and Sally Zhen, swoen and examined.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff T.P. Seafood & Meat Company, LLC and against Defendant hangen, LLC as follows:
Principal $27246.75
Pre-Judgment Interest $3119.44
Attorney's Fees $2825.00
Costs $480.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $33,671.19.
Does 1-10 are dismissed with prejudice.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Set For Trial On Jun-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
